config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects personal freedom, dignity, and fair treatment while still asking people to contribute to the common good. If individual rights are weak, society may look orderly on the surface but become unjust underneath.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu bukan sekadar preferensi pribadi; itu adalah batas penting terhadap kekuasaan negara dan mayoritas, dan sejarah kita penuh contoh saat “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan. Tentu ada situasi tertentu—seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum—di mana masyarakat bisa membatasi hak secara sempit, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sangat terukur, sementara, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, kata “masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menutupi ketidakadilan terhadap orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement because in Indonesia we have seen how “the public interest” can be used to silence minorities, excuse corruption, or pressure people to conform. Society is important, but it is not morally superior to the individual by default; the state and the majority should have to justify any limit on rights very carefully. I do think there are real exceptions, like disaster response, public health, or preventing violence, where temporary limits may be necessary. But if individual rights are treated as secondary all the time, then the people with less power are the ones who pay the price.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu; menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, justru sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan tanpa batas, hasilnya sering penyalahgunaan oleh negara atau tekanan mayoritas terhadap kelompok yang lemah. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, tetapi pembatasan hak harus sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan kebiasaan. Kalau tidak, istilah “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because in Indonesia that kind of logic has often been used to pressure minorities and silence dissent. I do not deny that public health, safety, and disaster response can justify temporary limits, but those limits must be narrow, accountable, and never treated as the normal rule. When people say “for the good of society,” I want to know who defines that good and who gets sacrificed for it. A society is not truly healthy if it protects harmony on the surface while allowing injustice against those with less power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh menjadi alasan default untuk mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat hak individu sebagai pagar terhadap kekuasaan negara dan tekanan mayoritas, karena sejarah kami sendiri menunjukkan betapa mudahnya “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan. Memang ada pengecualian seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, tetapi pembatasan harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan kebiasaan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya menjadi slogan yang paling sering merugikan orang yang paling lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
